subject: article
body:
There was an article in New Scientist magazine  (it is out of the UK)  where the author was talking about scientist taking money from Templeton to do research even thoughTempleton has a strong religious bent.    He mentioned the comparison with Harvard taking money from you. (he only stated that you were charged with soliciting prostitutes).    You're famous!


izmo@mindspring.com
EarthLink Revolves Around You.
